metrics.name: Account health review cycle time
metrics.definition: Median days from account health review trigger to approved risk/action summary, measured in aggregate per workflow window.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period window for the same workflow family.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare against the approved post-period window; report directional movement only.

metrics.name: Risk review coverage
metrics.definition: Share of eligible accounts with an approved health or renewal-risk review in the agreed window.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period window for the same workflow family.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare against the approved post-period window; report directional movement only.

metrics.name: Stale renewal action count
metrics.definition: Count of eligible renewal or account-risk follow-up actions older than the agreed freshness window, measured in aggregate.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period window for the same workflow family.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare against the approved post-period window; report directional movement only.

metrics.name: QBR preparation hours per account
metrics.definition: Median aggregate preparation hours per eligible QBR account, measured at the workflow-window level.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period window for the same workflow family.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare against the approved post-period window; report directional movement only.

metrics.name: Expansion signal follow-up coverage
metrics.definition: Share of eligible expansion or adoption signals with an approved follow-up action in the workflow window.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period window for the same workflow family.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare against the approved post-period window; report directional movement only.
